title: Cold Soul
description: A Hardcore Mod About Surviving In a Harsh Winter Environment
body:
This Modpack offers an experience of brutal winter survival. The world has plunged into a relentless blizzard in which warmth is short-lived, and water is life. Survive brutal nights, regulate your thirst and manage your temperature, and fight against the bitter, endless cold that surrounds you. In this mod pack, torches and campfires can easily burn out, blizzards can strike without warning, and every step out of an encampment can lead to your end. This is the definition of hardcore survival: resources are limited, the environment is unforgiving, and only those who prepare can survive. 



1. Features ❄️ Infinite Winter System: The world is locked in an endless deep freeze.

   

2. 💧 Thirst & Temperature Mechanics: You must manage to hydrate and stay warm if you're going to survive.



3.  🔥 Dynamic Fire: Your torches, campfires, and furnaces can all go out. You won't last long in the winter without fuel. 



4. 🌲 Dangers of the Environment: Blizzards, subzero winds, and limited visibility can make all exploration dangerous.



5. ⚒️ True Hardcore Survival: There is limited food, limited warmth, and it's slow recovery for survivalists. Food can also spoil.



6.  🏕️ Immersive Experience: Explore abandoned and dilapidated shelters and frozen ruins left behind by those that did not survive.



7.   📅 Immersive Seasons: Experience a dynamic world that shifts through realistic seasons that change crop growth.



   

Can you stay warm during a brutal winter world?
